series_metadata.series_title: State Printing Request for Paper and Materials
series_metadata.series_description: Used as a purchase order to draw from a general encumbrance. Request lists: description of materials to be purchased, bill to/ship to addresses, quantity, price, contract number (if applicable), and internal identification number.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in electronic form for three years, then erase, Electronic: Erase
